hero.title: Build Enterprise Applications
hero.subtitle: A production-ready template with DDD, Clean Architecture, and CQRS built in.

ddd.title: Domain-Driven Design
ddd.description: Bounded contexts, aggregates, value objects, and domain events following DDD principles.

cqrs.title: CQRS + Vertical Slice
cqrs.description: Commands and queries self-contained in feature slices. Easy to navigate, easy to extend.

compliance.title: Compliance Ready
compliance.description: GDPR, DORA, and PSD2 checklists included. Security patterns from OWASP Top 10.

about.title: About This Template
about.description: An opinionated, production-grade starting point for enterprise applications. Reuse the architecture, governance workflow, and quality standards — replace the demo code with your business logic.

stack.title: Technology Stack
stack.frontend: Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite + Vue I18n + Pinia
